channelHandles.title: Channel Handles
channelHandles.description: List of YouTube channel handles to scrape (e.g. ['@Drberg', '@MrBeast']). Include or omit the @ — both work.

cookies.title: YouTube Session Cookies
cookies.description: Your YouTube/Google session cookies as a JSON array. Required to see the 'View email address' button. Export from browser DevTools → Application → Cookies → youtube.com. Must include at minimum: SID, HSID, SSID, APISID, SAPISID, __Secure-1PSID, __Secure-3PSID.

twoCaptchaApiKey.title: 2Captcha API Key (optional)
twoCaptchaApiKey.description: API key from 2captcha.com to auto-solve the reCAPTCHA if the simple checkbox click fails. Get one at https://2captcha.com. Leave empty to attempt checkbox-only solving (works ~70% of the time with a real logged-in session).

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Optional proxy configuration. Using Apify residential proxies greatly improves reCAPTCHA pass rates.

maxConcurrency.title: Max Concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: How many channels to process simultaneously. Keep at 1–2 to avoid triggering YouTube's bot detection.

delayBetweenRequests.title: Delay Between Requests (ms)
delayBetweenRequests.description: Milliseconds to wait between processing each channel. A small delay mimics human behaviour.
